'''thayodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobforce|jobforce]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobforce|jobforce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thayodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæyedeth|thæyedeth]] || [[word:thæyedej|thæyedej]] || [[word:thæyedesh|thæyedesh]] || [[word:thæyede|thæyede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayoyodoth|thayoyodoth]] || [[word:thayoyodoj|thayoyodoj]] || [[word:thayoyodosh|thayoyodosh]] || [[word:thayoyodo|thayoyodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayodoth|thayodoth]] || [[word:thayodoj|thayodoj]] || [[word:thayodosh|thayodosh]] || [[word:thayodo|thayodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayofdoth|thayofdoth]] || [[word:thayofdoj|thayofdoj]] || [[word:thayofdosh|thayofdosh]] || [[word:thayofdof|thayofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thayodotho|thayodotho]] || [[word:thayodojo|thayodojo]] || [[word:thayodosho|thayodosho]] || [[word:thayodoko|thayodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thayodoth|thayodoth]] || [[word:thayodoj|thayodoj]] || [[word:thayodosh|thayodosh]] || [[word:thayodo|thayodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thayodothol|thayodothol]] || [[word:thayodojol|thayodojol]] || [[word:thayodoshol|thayodoshol]] || [[word:thayodokol|thayodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thayodothotho|thayodothotho]] || [[word:thayodojojo|thayodojojo]] || [[word:thayodoshosho|thayodoshosho]] || [[word:thayodoko|thayodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thayodothon|thayodothon]] || [[word:thayodojon|thayodojon]] || [[word:thayodoshon|thayodoshon]] || [[word:thayodokon|thayodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thayodothoro|thayodothoro]] || [[word:thayodojoro|thayodojoro]] || [[word:thayodoshoro|thayodoshoro]] || [[word:thayodokoro|thayodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
